table inet filter {
	chain input {
		type filter hook input priority 0; policy drop;
		ct state established,related counter packets 50000 bytes 5000000 accept # handle 1
		iifname "lo" accept # handle 2
		ip protocol icmp counter packets 100 bytes 5000 accept # handle 3
		tcp dport 22 counter packets 80 bytes 6400 accept # handle 4
		counter packets 5 bytes 400 drop # handle 99
	}

	chain forward {
		type filter hook forward priority 0; policy drop;
		ct state established,related counter packets 900000 bytes 1000000000 accept # handle 10
		ct state invalid counter packets 20 bytes 1600 drop # handle 11
		tcp dport 443 counter packets 20000 bytes 30000000 accept # handle 12
		tcp dport 80 counter packets 5000 bytes 4000000 accept # handle 13
		tcp dport 53 counter packets 300 bytes 30000 accept # handle 14
		udp dport 53 counter packets 800 bytes 50000 accept # handle 15
		udp dport 123 counter packets 50 bytes 4000 accept # handle 16
		counter packets 10 bytes 800 drop # handle 100
	}
}

table ip nat {
	chain postrouting {
		type nat hook postrouting priority srcnat;
		oifname "eth1" masquerade # handle 50
	}
}
